data_description.pv_actual_sensor: Best practice: a cumulative energy counter (Wh/kWh, total_increasing). If you only have a power reading, use a rolling mean_linear statistics helper (kW) — not a raw instantaneous sensor.
data_description.pv_export_sensor: Cumulative export energy counter (Wh/kWh) preferred; otherwise a rolling mean_linear helper (kW).
data_description.pv_actual_input_mode: Auto-detect picks energy counter vs averaged power from the unit (Wh/kWh vs W/kW).
data_description.pv_export_input_mode: Auto-detect by unit. Energy counter recommended.

database.title: Storage
database.description: History is stored in a built-in file (config/solcast_solar_enhanced.db) — no setup required. Leave enabled for tuning and dampening to work.

sites.title: Per-site sensor mapping
sites.description: {count} Solcast sites detected. For each array, choose the sensor that measures its generation. If several arrays share one inverter AC output, give each its DC/MPPT sensor too so output can be apportioned. Leave a site blank to skip it. 'Sensor type' is usually Auto-detect.
